recommendations.title: The Collini Case
recommendations.overview: A young lawyer stumbles upon a vast conspiracy while investigating a brutal murder case.

recommendations.title: Labyrinth of Lies
recommendations.overview: A young prosecutor in postwar West Germany investigates a massive conspiracy to cover up the Nazi pasts of prominent public figures.

recommendations.title: Next Sohee
recommendations.overview: A female detective investigates the cause of a high school girl’s death and uncovers a disturbing truth.

recommendations.title: The Teacher Who Promised the Sea
recommendations.overview: The buried memories of the Spanish Civil War are unearthed as a woman searches for the remains of her grandfather's father and discovers the story of an idealistic young teacher from Tarragona.

recommendations.title: Muzzle

recommendations.title: Seaspiracy
recommendations.overview: Passionate about ocean life, a filmmaker sets out to document the harm that humans do to marine species — and uncovers an alarming global conspiracy.

recommendations.title: Luther
recommendations.overview: During the early 16th century, idealistic German monk Martin Luther, disgusted by the materialism in the church, begins the dialogue that will lead to the Protestant Reformation.

recommendations.title: Exterritorial
recommendations.overview: When her son vanishes inside a US consulate, ex-special forces soldier Sara does everything in her power to find him — and uncovers a dark conspiracy.
